chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.070 — Nonapplicability of Subchapter

This subchapter does not apply to the transportation of an intermodal shipping container as defined by Section 623.401 (Definition) , regardless of whether the container is sealed or unsealed.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 7, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.text: This subchapter does not apply to the transportation of an intermodal shipping container as defined by Section 623.401 (Definition) , regardless of whether the container is sealed or unsealed.
